mapper.select: SELECT * FROM dinner_record ORDER BY record_date DESC
SELECT * FROM dinner_record WHERE department = #{department} ORDER BY record_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dinner_record (record_date, department, participant_count, amount, purpose, responsible_person, invoice_path, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{recordDate}, #{department}, #{participantCount}, #{amount}, #{purpose}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{invoicePath}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE dinner_record SET record_date = #{recordDate}, department = #{department}, participant_count = #{participantCount}, amount = #{amount}, purpose = #{purpose}, responsible_person = #{responsiblePerson}, invoice_path = #{invoicePath}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM dinner_record WHERE record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) FROM dinner_record WHERE department = #{department}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dinner_record WHERE record_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
